requirements.requirement: Critical Quality Attributes (CQAs) must be defined and justified
Critical Process Parameters (CPPs) must be identified with justified ranges
Complete batch formula including all excipients and quantities
Manufacturing process description with in-process controls
Blend uniformity acceptance criteria defined
All analytical methods must be fully described and validated per ICH Q2(R1)
Dissolution method transfer validation must be completed at receiving site
Assay method transfer validation (precision, accuracy, robustness) at receiving site
Product Development Report referenced in validations must be included
Compendial methods referenced must be confirmed as current editions
Release specifications for all CQAs must be provided
Stability specifications (may differ from release) must be defined
Out-of-specification (OOS) investigation procedure must be in place
Long-term stability data must support the claimed shelf life
Accelerated stability data (6 months minimum) must be provided
Stress testing data (thermal, humidity, photostability) must be provided
Stability data must be generated for receiving site packaging configuration
Container closure integrity data for receiving site must be provided
Current regulatory filing status and approved specifications must be confirmed
Post-approval change control strategy for site change must be documented
requirements.guidance: ICH Q10, regional site change guidance

requirements.requirement: List of all regulatory markets and applicable submissions
Equipment capability map confirming receiving site can run the process
Cleaning validation status for shared equipment at receiving site
requirements.guidance: ICH Q7, EMA cleaning validation guideline

requirements.requirement: Environmental controls (temperature, humidity, cleanroom classification) must be documented
Utility qualification (WFI, compressed air, HVAC) at receiving site
